name: exchange.merx/mcp
title: MERX - TRON Resource Exchange
description: TRON resource exchange for AI agents. 52 tools, 30 prompts, 21 resources.

environmentVariables.name: MERX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from merx.exchange. Unlocks trading, balance, standing orders, and monitors.

environmentVariables.name: TRON_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TRON wallet private key for signing transactions. Never sent to any server. Enables transfers, swaps, and contract calls.
